slogans: Work the point. Don't rush the finish.
Move them side to side. Create openings.
Hit to their backhand. Build pressure.
Use the angles. Open up the court.
Stay patient. The opportunity will come.
Mix up your shots. Keep them guessing.
Attack the net when you see weakness.
Use drop shots to bring them forward.
Lob when they're at the net. Reset the point.
Hit behind them. Catch them off guard.
Use cross-court shots to open up the line.
Work the middle. Don't give them angles.
Change the pace. Disrupt their rhythm.
Hit deep. Push them back behind the baseline.
Use topspin to control the ball.
Slice to change the rhythm. Mix it up.
